case_title: FAHAD S. KELANTAN VS. SOLHER IRON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KELANTAN, FAHAD S. AS TO DEFENDANT SOLHER IRON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KELANTAN, FAHAD S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOLHER IRON $3,715.20 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,805.20, PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED DAMAGES OF LOSS OF INCOME FOR THE 4.3 WEEKS OUT OF WORK. SINCE PLAINTIFF GRANTED FEE WAIVER, COSTS (IN THE AMOUNT OF $90.00) TO BE PAID TO THE COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELANTAN, FAHAD S. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

DEFENDANT SOLHER IRON IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARTIN SOLORZANO (PRESIDENT). JUAN SOLORZANO IS PRESENT AS A WITNESS FOR DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
